ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the vendor's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Vendor website */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the vendor operates in */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format and its usage */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension associated with the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_formats" (
  "vendor_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor-format association */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supported format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_formats_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_formats_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor distributing the software */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., proprietary, open-source) */,
  "system_requirements" TEXT /* System requirements for the software */,
  "installation_instructions" TEXT /* Installation instructions for the software */,
  "user_manual" TEXT /* User manual for the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_software" (
  "req_software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each required software entry */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software required */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("req_software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_software_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_software_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runtime_libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the runtime library */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software that requires this library */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the library's purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runtime_libraries_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license type */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_description" TEXT /* Description of the license terms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_licenses" (
  "software_license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software-license association */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the licensing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_licenses_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_licenses_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the software */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., install, update, access) */,
  "system_configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system configuration used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_system_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_configuration_id") REFERENCES system_configurations ("system_configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software update */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software receiving the update */,
  "version" TEXT /* New version number of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the update release */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "change_log_url" TEXT /* URL to the detailed change log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_updates_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor the contact is associated with */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_contacts_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support ticket */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user raising the ticket */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software related to the ticket */,
  "ticket_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was raised */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the ticket (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution or solution provided for the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility entry */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system supported by the software */,
  "hardware_platform" TEXT /* Hardware platform supported by the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_compatibility_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_installations" (
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installation */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software installed */,
  "system_configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system configuration used */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of the installation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who installed the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_installations_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_installations_system_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_configuration_id") REFERENCES system_configurations ("system_configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_installations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configurations" (
  "system_configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system configuration */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system of the configuration */,
  "hardware_platform" TEXT /* Hardware platform of the configuration */,
  "ram" TEXT /* RAM of the configuration */,
  "processor" TEXT /* Processor of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_reviews_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given to the vendor (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the vendor's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_evaluations_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)
